hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "📋 Documentation checklist — did you update any of these?
  • CLAUDE.md                               (architecture, scripts, conventions)
  • codebook.yaml                           (parameters, analyses, qualification rules)
  • diagnostic_classes.yaml                 (new/changed analysis classes)
  • README.md                               (user-facing workflow, setup, dependencies)
  • notebooks/templates/domains_boilerplate.ipynb      (contributor notebook template)
  • notebooks/templates/all_languages_boilerplate.ipynb (coordinator notebook template)
  • pyproject.toml version                  (if planars/ changed)

🔬 Codebase sanity checks — after major changes:
  • python check_snapshots.py               (after any analysis logic change)
  • python -m coding check-codebook         (after adding/changing classes or params)
  • python -m coding validate-coding        (after sheet structure changes)"}'
